## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New/updated agent
- [ ] New/updated skill (incl. stack profile)
- [ ] Workflow / orchestration
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs` passes
- [ ] README table updated (if an agent/skill was added)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] For behavior changes: I tested the affected role/workflow in Claude Code
